intercity_transport_back=''

  result=True
result_list.append(result)
result=False

for activity in allactivities(plan):

result=(poi_distance(target_city(plan), '火星2035 沉浸式科学艺术展 武汉站', accommodation_position)<=13.296079055237026)
result_list.append(result)
result=False
for r in result_list:
  result=result or r
